title: Timeline and Workload Widgets connectivity
excerpt: When using the timeline and workload widgets it would be great to have the 2 connected so that as your scroll across the timeline viewing your work the workload widget moves so the dates line up. That way you can see whe…

posts.author: abonsey (Andrew)
posts.cookedHtml:
When using the timeline and workload widgets it would be great to have the 2 connected so that as your scroll across the timeline viewing your work the workload widget moves so the dates line up. That way you can see when your workload turns red and what work is causing that.
Could be bi-directional so that you can scroll the workload the timeline moves accordingly
See screenshot as example:

image894×430 43 KB
